The Slice to Array Visitor — Slicing into a multi-dimensional array¶

New in version 0.1.

Module author: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

class slicer.slice2array.Slice2Array(object)¶

Methods¶

Slice2Array(generator = None):
Parameters:generator (ArrayGenerator) – you can either supply an ArrayGenerator created with your own parameters or any object which has the same methods and signatures as the ArrayGenerator
__call__(dimensions,variable,src,dst,meta,is_interval,**kargs):

The parameters are described in slicer.slicer.Slicer. Copies slices of variable into a newly create array.

preProcess(dimensions,variable,shape,slices,metadata):

creates the destination array using the shape and the variable.

postProcess(dimensions,variable,shape,slices,metadata):

calls the postProcess method of the ArrayGenerator.

array():

returns the newly created array.
